managelidar 0.1.5
  • Reference
    • How to use the functions

Replace the link with a given rel, or add it if not present

Source: R/stac_helpers.R
set_link.Rd

For relation types that should only appear once per object (root, parent, self, icon). Not suitable for child/item links, which are multi-valued - see add_child_link() and rebuild_item_links() for those.

Usage

set_link(links, new_link)

Arguments

links

List of link objects

new_link

The link object to set (its rel determines what gets replaced)

Value

Updated links list

Details

Replaces in place (at the existing link's position) rather than removing and re-appending, so a call that doesn't actually change anything doesn't reorder the links list either - that reordering would otherwise make before/after equality checks (used to detect whether a write is actually needed) report a change that isn't really there.

On this page
